mnemonics: Mother Never Gets Eaten By Zombies
Most Ninjas Grow Evil Beards yearly
keyPoints: Modus Ponens: If A implies B and A is true, then B must be true
Modus Tollens: If A implies B and A is false, then B must be false
Disjunctive Syllogism: If A or B is true and A is false, then B must be true
Hipponensis: If A implies B and B is true, then A must be true
